ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* A brief description about the user */,
  "verified_email" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email is verified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator assigned to the forum */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the forum was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the forum was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the forum (e.g., active, archived, private) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forum is private */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum role required to access the forum (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum to which the topic belongs */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the topic */,
  "pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is pinned */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is locked */,
  "last_reply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reply to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic to which the post belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last updated */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., initial, reply) */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post has received */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post has been edited */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is popular */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "topic_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic-tag association */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is the primary tag for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-tag association */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is the primary tag for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post to which the reply belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was last updated */,
  "reply_status" TEXT /* Status of the reply (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the reply has received */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reply has been edited */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the topic or post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic viewed (if applicable) */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post viewed (if applicable) */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the view event occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the topic or post (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the topic or post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic liked (if applicable) */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post liked (if applicable) */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the like event occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to like the topic or post (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., bus, minibus) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location for the service */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location for the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, completed) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking for which the payment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "verified_booking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., post deletion, user ban) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the action (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum to which the setting applies */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forum is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_settings_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to which the setting applies */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone for personalized time display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
